Description: After the end of the WRC+ era, the Rally1 regulation marks a new start for top-level WRC. To create a competitive car, a pre-season prototype variant is built for testing. This prototype uses an existing monocoque chassis, suspension, and engine for cost reduction, added with a dummy hybrid unit to evaluate mechanical changes. Set at a minimum weight of 1260 kg, wheelbase has been increased to about 2600 mm, and gravel dampers have a limited travel of 270 mm.
